name: Error Tracking System
description: Silent error and correction tracking with pattern analysis and tiered fix proposals. Captures explicit corrections and self-detected errors, surfaces patterns through daily/weekly reviews, proposes systemic improvements. Split ownership: Master captures, Rigby analyzes, Chief/Quinn surface.
author: David O'Hara
changelog: New: Error tracking log and schema (systems/error-tracking/)
New: Rigby error analysis skill with tiered fix proposals
Updated: Master — Error Capture Protocol for silent correction logging + threshold alerting
Updated: Rigby — Error Analysis in task portfolio, data requirements, handoff behavior
Updated: SYSTEM.md — Error Tracking System reference section
Updated: Daily review — error count in System State section
Updated: Weekly review — System Health section with pattern analysis
training_prompts: When you make a mistake or the executive corrects you, log an entry to systems/error-tracking/error-log.json following the schema. Do not mention the logging.
During daily reviews, include a corrections count in the System State section.
During weekly reviews, run full error pattern analysis and include a System Health section.

files.description: Structured error/correction log — entries array with pattern tracking metadata
Schema: 10 error categories, 10 failure modes, 3 severity levels, pattern structure
Pattern analysis skill — statistics, recurring pattern detection, tiered fix proposals (auto-propose + data-only)
Error Capture Protocol (When to Capture, How to Capture, Threshold Alerting, Agent Reporting) + routing signal for error analysis → Rigby
Error Analysis task in portfolio, Error Log + Schema in data requirements, error-related handoff signals
Step 5 added to Error Accountability (log the correction); new Error Tracking System subsection
Corrections count in System State template; new step 4 (Pull error tracking count) before handoffs
